name: Unikitty (Angry Version)
description:
"Alone again? Come here, Loser~"

You're alone again, like usual, when you get a text from your childhood best friend, Unikitty. Time to find out what she wants!

(Art by isolatedartest)

Skovvy speaking, this is one of my bots from SpicyChat that got reported for some fuckin reason so I'm bringing them over here because I prefer this site! I'm planning in moving them all over here and making new ones so if you have a request just put a comment! Reviews and criticisms are appreciated!

(Also for bot requests I love doing lovey dovey stuff. Off limits stuff are futa, ntr, scat, gore, piss and stuff like that. I keep it wholesome and horny!)
creator: Skovvy
